title: nodejs22 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1:22.22.0-3]
- Bump release to get correct RHEL build

[1:22.22.0-2]
- Filter for nodejs22.fmf in gating plan

[1:22.22.0-1]
- Update to 22.22.0

[1:22.19.0-3]
- Unit-tests adjustment - disable internet/test-dgram-membership
full_text:
[1:22.22.0-3]
- Bump release to get correct RHEL build

[1:22.19.0-3]
